automationAndIssueOps.goal: Convert structured plan artifacts into executable issue queues and operational dashboards.

automation.item: scripts\plan_to_issues.py generates markdown issues and issues.json from 09 backlog
scripts\build_risk_dashboard.py generates dashboards\risk-burndown.html from data snapshots

automationAndIssueOps.executionRule: Generated issue files are source-of-truth derivatives; regenerate after backlog changes.
